orderConfirmation.subject: Order {orderNumber} confirmed
orderConfirmation.heading: Thanks for your order!
orderConfirmation.intro: Your order {orderNumber} has been received and payment is confirmed. We'll start packing right away.
orderConfirmation.shippingNote: We'll email you again as soon as your package ships — with a tracking number.

orderShipped.preview: Order {orderNumber} is on the way — tracking {trackingNumber}
orderShipped.subject: 📦 Order {orderNumber} is on the way
orderShipped.heading: Your order is on the way!
orderShipped.intro: Good news — your order {orderNumber} has been packed and handed to the courier. You should receive it within {eta}.

refundConfirmation.subject: Refund for order {orderNumber}
refundConfirmation.heading: {name}, your refund has been processed
refundConfirmation.intro: The amount for order {orderNumber} has been refunded to your payment method.
refundConfirmation.timingNote: The money typically arrives in your account within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank.

abandonedCart.preview: Did you forget something in your cart?
abandonedCart.subject: Did you forget something in your cart?
abandonedCart.heading: You have an unfinished cart
abandonedCart.intro: We noticed you left a few items in your cart. They're still waiting for you — would you like to complete your order?
abandonedCart.footerNote: If you've already completed your order, please ignore this email.
